title: Volta a Menorca Mountain Bike Tour
location: Es Migjorn Gran, Alaior y Es Mercadal
description: The twentieth edition of this non-competitive mountain-bike tour crosses the island over three stages departing from Es Migjorn Gran, Alaior and Es Mercadal, one of them at night. Run entirely by volunteers, it caps participation at 500 riders to protect the landscape. It takes place from 9 to 11 October 2026.
